---
title: "Home Physics Lab"
subtitle: "Learn physics one experiment at a time"
---

# Welcome

This site contains guides and resources for educational physics experiments. Whether you're a curious adult, a homeschool parent, or just someone who wants to understand the forces and phenomena of the natural world, you'll find hands-on experiments with clear explanations.

## Quick Links

### [Supply Inventory](inventory.qmd)
Complete list of supplies and equipment with suggested experiments for each.

### [Experiments](experiments/index.qmd)
Hands-on physics experiments — coming soon.

## About This Project

This project is designed for adults and children interested in learning physics through hands-on experimentation. All experiments use equipment that can be obtained for home use, with clear safety guidelines.

The guides emphasize understanding *why* things happen, not just following procedures. Each experiment includes the underlying physics explained at an accessible level.
